title: Begonia kennedyi
taxonomy: Begonia kennedyi is classified within the plant family Begoniaceae. It belongs to the genus Begonia and is a species of flowering plant. Begonia kennedyi is a part of the order Cucurbitales, which is a large and diverse order of flowering plants. This species is native to the tropical regions of Africa and is often found growing in shaded areas. Further classification of Begonia kennedyi includes its kingdom as Plantae and its class as Magnoliopsida.
uses: Begonia kennedyi is a species native to the tropical regions of Madagascar, but limited information is available about its traditional uses.
